name: contributor-photo-gallery
description: Showcase your contributions to WordPress.org/photos with elegant and responsive photo galleries.

scripts.plugin-zip: cd .. && rm -f contributor-photo-gallery.zip && zip -r contributor-photo-gallery.zip contributor-photo-gallery -x '*node_modules*' '*.git*' '*.docker*' '*docker-compose.yml*' '*.env*' '*package*.json*' '*.md' '*phpcs.xml*' '*.distignore*'
